case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION $4,060.00 U.S. et al

docket_entries.description: RESPONSE TO PETITION FOR FORFEITURE IN REM FILED BY CLAIMANT LOTIERZO, STEVEN J.
DECLARATION OF PAMELA A. UNDERWOOD REGARDING STIPULATION TO JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA

PETITION FOR FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION $4,060.00 U.S. CURRENCY DOES 1 TO 100, INCLUSIVE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $4,060.00 PLUS INTEREST SINCE DATE OF DEPOSIT IS HEREBY DECLARED FORFEITED PURSUANT TO H&S 11470 ET SEQ AND DISPOSED OF AS PROVIDED BY H&S 11489. $4,060.00 U.S. CURRENCY HELD UNDER SAN FRANCISCO POLICE DEPARTMENT NUMBER 100-322-724 AND SEIZED UNDER SEARCH WARRANT IN THIS CASE BE RELEASED TO THE SAN FRANCISCO POLICE DEPARTMENT FOR THE PURPOSES OF DISTRIBUTING THE PROPERTY PURSUANT TO HEALTH AND SAFETY CODE SECTION 11489. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
